/CAL:MOTION TO REDUCE TO A MISDEMEANOR & RECEIPT OF SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT/X:THE COURT RECEIVED THE SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT FROM THE ADULT PROBATION/DEF:ISDOING WELL/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 3 TO A MISDEMEANOR IS GRANTED,/MISD4:3/CTORD:THE PROBATION PREVIOUSLY ORDERED SHALL NOW BE SERVED AS UNSUPERVISEDPROBATION, (COURT PROBATION)/X:ORDER FOR REDUCTION OF OFFENSE FROM FELONY TO MISDEMEANOR (PC 17(B)(3) SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT/

/CAL:MOTION TO REDUCE TO A MISDEMEANOR/SUPP:07-12-13/S24/CTORD:APD TO PREPARE A REPORT TO VERIFY IF DEFENDANT HAS PAID RESTITUTION AND COMPLETED THECOMMUNITY SERVICE HOURS/CONTD:MOTION TO REDUCE TO A MISDEMEANOR AND RECEIPT OF SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT/DAWT/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 8D/CTS:8/WS/DNACOMP/VF4:240/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/OR25/REST:TBD/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/MISD10:VICTIM RESTITUTION PAID IN FULL AND NO NEW ARREST/X:THE MOTION TO REDUCE PURSUANT TOPC 17(B) MAY BE FILED IN ONE YEAR, COMMENCING FROM 06-09-12/
